---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or developer problem are you trying to solve?

If this could be completed as a small, self-contained change, it may be a good contributor task.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Scope

- What should be included
- What should stay out of scope

## Why This Fits Contributors

- It is limited to a single area of the app, integration, or docs.
- It can be verified locally.
- It does not require production access or unresolved product decisions.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives or workarounds you considered.

## Additional Context

Links, examples, or screenshots.
